title: LostieLauncher, all of EricLostie's games in one place
description: Download LostieLauncher for Windows: install, update and play EricLostie's fangames from a single interface. Resumable downloads, automatic updates and 10 visual themes.

hero.tagline: All of EricLostie's games, in one place
hero.subtitle: Browse the catalog, download your games and keep them always up to date from a clean, fast interface built for Windows.

install.heading: How to download & install
install.subheading: You'll be playing in under a minute. No weird setup.

steps.title: Download the installer
steps.description: Hit the download button and save LostieLauncher-win-Setup.exe to your computer.

steps.title: Run the installer
steps.description: Double-click the downloaded file. The launcher installs and opens automatically when it's done.

steps.title: Pick your game
steps.description: Open the Library, press Download on the game you want and wait for the download to finish.

steps.title: Play!
steps.description: Hit Play from My games. The launcher updates itself and keeps your games up to date.

install.smartScreenNote: If Windows SmartScreen shows a warning, click "More info" and then "Run anyway". The installer is signed with an independent developer signature that Windows doesn't know well yet — it isn't dangerous.

footer.tagline: Made with ❤️ for the EricLostie community
footer.disclaimer: LostieLauncher is a fan project. It is not affiliated with Nintendo, Game Freak or The Pokémon Company.
